# Fixtures

Planned fixtures:

- Clean single-package Git repository.
- Dirty monorepo with unrelated user changes.
- Non-Git project.
- Nested and ambiguous repositories.
- Malformed manifest.
- Large tree requiring bounded traversal.
- Secret-like files that must not be read.
- Adapter with valid extensions.
- Adapter attempting to weaken restrictions.

Fixtures must contain synthetic values only.
